description_long: This bungalow is situated on a rectangular plot with a green lawn and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The structure features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof, complemented by a secondary, larger building at the rear, possibly a garage or auxiliary space. The main building has a prominent front facade with large windows and a small porch area, while the rear structure is more solid and less fenestrated. The property is bordered by a low wall and includes a driveway gate, with a pathway connecting the two main structures. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with some wooden or composite accents. The overall layout is open, with ample outdoor space and a clear separation between the living area and the auxiliary building.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a small porch, and a separate rear building on a landscaped plot with a driveway and low boundary wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, and driveway leading up to the bungalow, with the auxiliary building visible in the background.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the relationship between the main bungalow and the rear building, as well as the boundary wall and green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the larger auxiliary building and the open backyard area, with the main bungalow partially visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the flat rooflines of both buildings, the connecting pathway, and the overall plot layout with driveway access.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
